about.text: We're a digital growth agency helping businesses scale through powerful ads, SEO, stunning websites, and social media marketing. We focus on real results, the kind you can see in your lead numbers, not just your engagement rate.

caseStudies.title: Skincare & beauty brand
caseStudies.desc: Cut cost-per-lead by 61% in six weeks through audience testing and creative refresh.
caseStudies.body: This skincare and beauty brand came to us with high ad spend but weak returns. We rebuilt their Meta Ads account from the ground up: fresh audience testing, new creative angles, and a simplified funnel from ad click to checkout. Within six weeks, cost-per-lead dropped 61% while lead volume held steady, freeing up budget to scale further.

caseStudies.title: Restaurant chain
caseStudies.desc: Reached #1 on Google for their top search terms within three months.
caseStudies.body: This restaurant chain had strong food and loyal regulars, but almost no presence on Google Search. We ran a full SEO overhaul: Google Business Profile optimization, on-page fixes across their menu and location pages, and a targeted link-building push. Within three months they held the #1 spot for their top search terms.

caseStudies.title: Fashion e-commerce store
caseStudies.desc: Grew Instagram following 14x with a consistent content and engagement strategy.
caseStudies.body: This fashion e-commerce store had a small but engaged following and wanted real growth. We built a consistent content calendar around what their audience actually shared and engaged with, paired with a lightweight paid boost strategy. Their Instagram following grew from 2K to 28K, a 14x increase, alongside a measurable lift in site traffic from social.

testimonials.quote: Our lead volume more than doubled in the first month. The team actually explains what they're doing, not just sending reports.
testimonials.name: Rima A.

testimonials.quote: We finally show up on Google when people search for us locally. Bookings picked up within the second month.
testimonials.name: Tanvir H.

testimonials.quote: Fast, responsive, and honest about what's working and what isn't. That honesty is rare in this industry.
testimonials.name: Nusrat J.

faq.q: How long does SEO take to show results?
faq.a: Most clients see meaningful ranking movement within 6–10 weeks, with compounding gains after month three as content and backlinks build up.
No. We work month-to-month by default. Longer commitments are optional and come with a discounted rate.
Strategy, execution, and reporting for the services in your plan. Ad spend itself is billed separately, directly to the platform.

faq.q: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faq.a: Yes, anytime. Changes take effect from your next billing cycle.
You'll get a plain-language report on the schedule for your plan, plus direct WhatsApp access to ask questions anytime.
